summary: The reproduction starts a minimal capnp-rpc server, sends a forged Return message with an oversized answerId, and observes the victim panic with an index-out-of-bounds error in the Return handler.
expected_security_impact: A single unauthenticated network message should make the victim RPC task panic due to the unchecked questions.slots[answer_id] index.
actual_observed_result: Running the reproduction launched the victim server, delivered the forged Return message, and the victim process exited after logging an index-out-of-bounds panic from the capnp-rpc Return handler path.
verification_method: The run script checks that the victim process exits unsuccessfully and that its stderr log contains both the panic marker and the out-of-bounds index message after the forged message is sent.
evidence_produced_by_run: reproduction/output/victim.log contains a Rust panic emitted after processing the forged Return message.
reproduction/output/victim.log contains an index-out-of-bounds message referencing the questions slot vector access.
The victim process exits with a non-zero status immediately after the malicious sender transmits the crafted message.
